title: A Murder Mystery
description: A simple murder mystery minigame with a dangerous twist, everyone has weapons
body:
A Murder Mystery is a simple murder mystery game where everyone has a gun, a knife, and a telecommunicator, it was originally intended to be bigger but the scope was too large, so I quickly finished it so everyone could play.

### Features
> - 1 Murderer per 6 players (starting at 1, no limit).
> - Endless rounds...
> - Sound design (fancy!)
> - Guns,
> - Death,
> - Murder.

### How to play / Reccomendations
> - If you don't have a map play in a woodland mansion with peacful mode on.
> - Do /function murder:roundstart to start
> - Play without fullbright, and with shaders like [Hysteria](https://modrinth.com/shader/hysteria-shaders)

Inspired by : [The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express)
